source_pr.title: domain: improve UT coverage to 80%
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Improve UT coverage of ddl package. Before: ok github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain 0.174s coverage: 51.0% of statements After: ok github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain 1.008s coverage: 80.7% of statements ### What is changed and how it works? Add more UTs. ### Check List Tests - Unit test

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR mainly adds unit tests to improve domain/DDL-related coverage. The case evidence is a Go module checksum line and does not provide a concrete intermittent flaky trigger or an explained stabilization mechanism, so keep the conservative fallback classification.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: files: domain/c.out, domain/domain_test.go, domain/schema_validator_test.go, ddl/syncer.go, domain/db_test.go, domain/domain.go, go.mod, go.sum
